issues.message: Prop 'onChartInited' is defined in the YagrChartProps interface (react.tsx:21) but is never destructured or used in the component implementation (react.tsx:35). The data file documents it as a functional prop, but passing it has no effect at runtime.

Description says 'render and show events' but the source (react.tsx:130-140) actually subscribes to 'render' once and 'show' twice (duplicate 'show' listener). The hook description omits mention of this duplication.
